query:
SELECT n.id, n.userId, n.performerId, p.name, p.performerType 
FROM userNftInventory n 
JOIN performers p ON n.performerId = p.id 
WHERE n.userId = (SELECT id FROM users WHERE openId = 'i8t9fnusv9acyGYNiVhjbx');
command:

FROM userNftInventory n 
JOIN performers p ON n.performerId = p.id
